stemHtml:
A pilot is planning a flight from position A to position B via the shortest distance.
Given the following information, calculate the initial true track between the two positions.
Position A: 37ºN, 010ºE
Position B: 37ºN, 010ºW,
cosine 37º = 0.80
sine 37º = 0.60
cosine 10º = 0.98
sine 10º = 0.17
